explanation: This LTL property ensures that whenever the system is in performance review mode, the explanation provided should always be detailed. This matches the requirement that 'In performance reviews, the explanation should be detailed and contain all information,' assuming 'detailed' encapsulates the requirement to include all information while in performance review mode.

The requirement says that whenever the system is in performance review mode, the explanation should be detailed and contain all information. Since we are limited to the provided atomic propositions, we use 'detailed' to capture the property that the explanation is detailed. Therefore, the appropriate translation is: globally, whenever performanceReviewMode holds, detailed must also hold. This ensures that in every case where a performance review is ongoing, the explanation is always detailed.

This LTL property expresses that, whenever the system is in performance review mode (performanceReviewMode is true), it is always the case (globally) that the explanation is detailed (detailed is true). This captures the requirement that in all situations where a performance review is occurring, the explanation must be detailed and therefore should include all relevant information, as 'detailed' is defined as summarizing the necessary completeness per the atomic proposition description.

This LTL property states that whenever the system is operating in performance review mode ('performanceReviewMode' is true), it is always the case that the explanation is detailed ('detailed' is true). This captures the requirement that in performance reviews, the explanation should always be detailed and contain all required information (as summarized in the 'detailed' atomic proposition and applied when in 'performanceReviewMode').

This choice is made because the input says that in the performance review context, the explanation should always be detailed and should contain all information (which is interpreted as detailedness/completeness). This best matches the requirement that in every performance review case, the explanation is always detailed.

This ensures that in all instances of performance review, the explanation adheres to the requirement of being detailed.
